decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 9/10 sessions consistent. Session 12 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 58/2935 lines reworked (2.0%, 28/50). 0/30 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 1.5% (13/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 68. Session 12: 52 (process:40 efficiency:9 ttfw:3).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 230/230 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
